subject: Fermi  trigger No 746587425: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)

MASTER-Tavrida robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, SAI Crimea astronomical station) started inspect of the Fermi GRB240829.06 (trigger No 746587425,13h 38m 36.00s , +57d 16m 48.0s, R=1) errorbox  16 sec after notice time and 66973 sec after trigger time at 2024-08-29 19:59:54 UT, with upper limit up to  17.5 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 62 deg. The sun  altitude  is -32.0 deg. 

MASTER-Kislovodsk robotic telescope  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, Kislovodsk Solar Station of Pulkovo observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB240829.06 errorbox  167 sec after notice time and 67124 sec after trigger time at 2024-08-29 20:02:25 UT, with upper limit up to  17.0 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 67 deg. The sun  altitude  is -35.6 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = 59 deg., longitude l = 110 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2580883

We obtain a following upper limits.
